subcodes.first_line: O ye who are favored in the Threshold of the Almighty and the lovers of His Holiness, BAHA'O'LLAH! According to the reports... O Thou Almighty! Illumine Thou this Association and make Thou this gathering the bright candle of the world!
subcodes.subjects: @importance of community building, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @call to action, @promotion of commerce and industry, @East and West; communication between East and West, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
